subcodes.first_line: O Varqa! O thou that gazest toward the Most Exalted Horizon! The Lord of Names maketh mention of thee in this station [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقاء یا ایها الناظر الی الافق الاعلی یذکرک مالک الاسماء فی هذا المقام
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @love of God, @call to action, @praise and encouragement
